# iru_blueprint (Data Source)

Get details for a specific blueprint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the Blueprint.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
- `enrollment_code` (String)
- `enrollment_code_active` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)
